## Checklist
- [ ] This PR only touches files inside one module folder (or shared/core,
      with an ADR linked below justifying why)
- [ ] Request/response shapes match `schemas/`
- [ ] Contract tests pass without requiring another module's code to run
- [ ] README updated if inputs/outputs/dependencies changed

## ADR link (only required for shared/ or core/ changes)
